## **Story Title**
**Title**: As a (user) I want to...
**Priority**: Must-have
**Source**: User interview response #0?

### **Acceptance Criteria**
#### **Happy Path**
Acceptance criteria for successful interaction

#### **Exceptional Path**
Acceptance criteria for non-successful interaction

#### **Non‑Functional Criteria**
Performance/Speed/Accessibility/Whatever
